items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性随机对照研究评估了瑞士急诊科物理治疗师（APP）在诊断和治疗肌肉骨骼疾病方面与住院医师和资深医师的一致性。研究结果将为物理治疗师在高级实践角色中的应用提供重要依据，尤其是在处理非紧急肌肉骨骼病症方面，可能优化患者流程和资源分配。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼功能障碍的一线诊断与治疗一致性：前瞻性随机对照研究
items.titleEn: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summaryZh: 一项在瑞士进行的随机对照试验评估了物理治疗师与住院医师在急诊科肌肉骨骼病症诊断和治疗方面与资深医师的一致性，旨在为高级物理治疗实践角色提供依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective randomized controlled study evaluates the diagnostic and treatment agreement of physiotherapists in advanced practice roles (APP) compared to resident and senior physicians in a Swiss emergency department for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. The findings will be crucial for establishing the utility of APP roles in managing non-urgent musculoskeletal conditions, potentially optimizing patient flow and resource allocation.
items.limitation: The study was conducted in a single center, and the generalizability of findings to other healthcare settings may be limited. The reference standard was senior physicians, and future studies could compare directly against a wider range of specialists.
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted in a single center, and the generalizability of findings to other healthcare settings may be limited. The reference standard was senior physicians, and future studies could compare directly against a wider range of specialists.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A study developed a core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy practice, research, and quality assessment, covering functioning and other domains.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究致力于为儿科物理治疗开发一套核心的患者报告结局（PROs）和测量（PROMs）集。通过多方（青少年、家长、治疗师）参与和专家评估，选定了 9 项 PROs，涵盖功能（身体功能等）领域。这有助于规范儿科 PT 实践中的结局评估，提升研究和质量评估的一致性。
items.titleZh: 制定儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集
items.titleEn: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summaryZh: 一项研究为儿科物理治疗制定了一套核心的患者报告结局（PROs）和测量（PROMs），共包含 9 项，涵盖功能等领域，以规范日常实践、研究和质量评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed a core set of patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy. Through multi-stakeholder input and expert review, nine PROs were selected, covering domains like functioning. This initiative will help standardize outcome assessment in pediatric PT practice, enhancing consistency in research and quality evaluation.
items.limitation: The selection process involved surveys and expert panels, which may introduce biases. The applicability and validation of the selected PROMs across diverse pediatric populations require further study.
items.limitationEn: The selection process involved surveys and expert panels, which may introduce biases. The applicability and validation of the selected PROMs across diverse pediatric populations require further study.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summary: An assessor-blinded RCT found that a targeted strengthening program (STRENGTH) led by physiotherapists was superior to a standardized stretching program (STRETCH) for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) regarding hip-related quality of life and patient-perceived global change at 6 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项评估了物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）治疗的随机对照试验（RCT）发现，目标性强化训练（STRENGTH）组在 6 个月时，其髋部相关生活质量（QOL）和患者感知变化总评分（GROC）均优于标准化牵伸（STRETCH）组。这为 PT 提供了强有力的证据，支持在 FAI 治疗中优先采用强化训练方案。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征治疗效果：一项评估者设盲、有限披露的随机对照试验（PhysioFIRST 研究）
items.titleEn: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者设盲的随机对照试验（RCT）发现，物理治疗师主导的目标性强化训练（STRENGTH）方案，在 6 个月时，相比标准化牵伸（STRETCH）方案，在股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的髋部相关生活质量和患者感知变化方面更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evaluating physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) found that the targeted strengthening (STRENGTH) group showed superior hip-related quality of life (QOL) and patient-perceived Global Rating of Change (GROC) at 6 months compared to the standardized stretching (STRETCH) group. This provides strong evidence for PTs to prioritize strengthening protocols in FAI management.
items.limitation: The study involved limited disclosure, meaning patients and therapists knew the treatment allocation but outcome assessors were blinded. This design may have residual bias.
items.limitationEn: The study involved limited disclosure, meaning patients and therapists knew the treatment allocation but outcome assessors were blinded. This design may have residual bias.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis identified the most effective physical therapy interventions for rotator cuff tendinopathy, suggesting a combination of manual therapy, exercise, and education as optimal.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和网络荟萃分析（NMA）旨在比较不同物理治疗干预措施对成人肩袖肌腱病（RC tendinopathy）的疗效。结果确定了最有效的干预措施组合（例如，结合手法治疗、运动疗法和教育），为 PT 提供了优化肩袖肌腱病治疗方案的有力证据。
items.titleZh: 成人肩袖肌腱病物理治疗干预的比较有效性：系统综述与网络荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络荟萃分析（NMA）确定了成人肩袖肌腱病（RC tendinopathy）最有效的物理治疗干预组合，建议结合手法治疗、运动疗法和教育。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and network meta-analysis (NMA) compares the efficacy of different physical therapy interventions for adult rotator cuff tendinopathy (RC tendinopathy). It identifies the most effective combination of interventions (e.g., combining manual therapy, exercise, and education), providing strong evidence for PTs to optimize treatment protocols for RC tendinopathy.
items.limitation: The certainty of evidence for some comparisons was assessed as low or very low, necessitating caution in interpreting results and potentially limiting the generalizability of findings.
items.limitationEn: The certainty of evidence for some comparisons was assessed as low or very low, necessitating caution in interpreting results and potentially limiting the generalizability of findings.

items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT found that a dynamic wrist-hand stretching device improved flexor spasticity and hand function in chronic stroke patients, suggesting it as a potential adjunct therapy.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步的随机对照试验（RCT）表明，一种动态腕手牵伸装置可有效改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛，并可能改善手部功能。对于康复从业者而言，这提示了一种可能比传统牵伸更易于患者居家依从的辅助干预手段，值得进一步大型研究验证。
items.titleZh: 使用动态腕手牵伸设备改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛：初步随机对照试验
items.titleEn: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summaryZh: 一项初步随机对照试验显示，一种动态腕手牵伸设备可改善慢性卒中患者的屈肌痉挛，并可能改善手部功能，有望成为一种辅助治疗手段。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT suggests that a dynamic wrist-hand stretching device can effectively improve flexor spasticity and potentially hand function in patients with chronic stroke. This points towards a potential adjunct intervention that may improve home adherence compared to conventional stretching, warranting further investigation in larger trials.
items.limitation: This is a pilot study with a small sample size (n=30), limiting the generalizability of its findings and the ability to draw definitive conclusions about long-term efficacy.

items.title: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: A meta-analysis found repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) to be effective for improving motor function in Parkinson's disease patients, short-term and long-term, with factors like stimulation site and frequency influencing outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析评估了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病（PD）患者运动功能的影响，并探讨了影响治疗效果的因素。结果显示 rTMS 短期和长期均能改善运动功能，同时提示了优化治疗参数（如刺激位点、频率等）的重要性。对于神经康复从业者，这是基于证据的治疗选择，可考虑作为 PD 患者运动功能改善的辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激对帕金森病患者运动功能的疗效及调节因素：荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summaryZh: 一项荟萃分析表明，重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）可短期和长期改善帕金森病（PD）患者的运动功能，且刺激位点、频率等因素会影响治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis evaluates the effects of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) on motor function in Parkinson's disease (PD) patients and explores influencing factors. It indicates that rTMS can improve motor function both short-term and long-term, highlighting the importance of optimizing treatment parameters. This provides an evidence-based therapeutic option for neurorehabilitation professionals to consider as an adjunct for improving motor function in PD patients.
items.limitation: The included studies varied in stimulation site, coil type, frequency, and treatment duration, leading to heterogeneity that may affect the pooled results.
items.limitationEn: The included studies varied in stimulation site, coil type, frequency, and treatment duration, leading to heterogeneity that may affect the pooled results.

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review identified the need for weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injuries due to high recurrence rates and analyzed the methodological quality of existing literature, highlighting a need for higher-quality research.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述旨在为腘绳肌损伤的重返运动制定加权标准，并对现有研究的方法学质量进行了分析。鉴于腘绳肌损伤的高复发率，明确的重返运动标准对于减少复发、降低经济成本至关重要。该研究为制定更严谨的评估和决策流程提供了参考。
items.titleZh: 制定腘绳肌损伤重返运动的加权标准：系统综述与方法学质量分析
items.titleEn: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述旨在为腘绳肌损伤的重返运动制定加权标准，并分析了现有研究的方法学质量，强调了提高研究质量以制定可靠标准的需求。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review aims to establish weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injuries and analyzes the methodological quality of existing research. Given the high recurrence rate of hamstring injuries, clear return-to-play criteria are crucial for reducing relapses and economic costs. This study provides a reference for developing more rigorous assessment and decision-making processes.
items.limitation: The review identified significant heterogeneity in the methodological quality of included studies, suggesting a need for higher-quality research to establish robust return-to-play criteria.
items.limitationEn: The review identified significant heterogeneity in the methodological quality of included studies, suggesting a need for higher-quality research to establish robust return-to-play criteria.
